text: Fill in the blanks on the molecular organisation of the cell and biological membranes.
questions: The four classes of biomolecules are *carbohydrates/Carbohydrates*, *lipids/Lipids*, *proteins/Proteins*, and *nucleic acids/Nucleic acids*.
The cell membrane is composed of a *phospholipid bilayer/phospholipid/lipid bilayer* with embedded proteins, as described by the *fluid mosaic/Fluid Mosaic* model proposed by Singer and Nicolson.

*Lysosomes/Lysosome* are membrane-bound organelles containing hydrolytic enzymes that function at an acidic pH of approximately *4.5/4.5-5.0*; defects cause *lysosomal storage diseases/storage diseases*.
The *mitochondria/Mitochondrion* are double-membrane organelles responsible for *ATP/adenosine triphosphate* synthesis via oxidative phosphorylation, and they show *maternal/matrilineal* inheritance.
